pl.netigen.coreapi.splash

Interface ISplashConfig

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IAppConfig, ICoreMainVM, ISplashVM
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    CoreMainVM, SplashVM

    public ISplashConfig

    Base Splash configuration

    • Field Detail

      • Companion

        static pl.netigen.coreapi.splash.ISplashConfig.Companion Companion

      • DEFAULT_MAX_CONSENT_WAIT_TIME_MS

        static long DEFAULT_MAX_CONSENT_WAIT_TIME_MS
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • DEFAULT_SPLASH_MAX_LOAD_INTERSTITIAL_WAIT_TIME_MS

        static long DEFAULT_SPLASH_MAX_LOAD_INTERSTITIAL_WAIT_TIME_MS
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Constructor Detail

      • ISplashConfig

        public ISplashConfig()

    • Method Detail

      • isNoAdsAvailable

        boolean isNoAdsAvailable()

        Set if there is or isn't no-ads payment in application

      • getMaxConsentWaitTime

        long getMaxConsentWaitTime()

        Max white time on first splash launch to fetch consent information from web services

        Default value: DEFAULT_MAX_CONSENT_WAIT_TIME_MS

      • getMaxInterstitialWaitTime

        long getMaxInterstitialWaitTime()

        Max white time for load splash interstitial ad, it is start counting after consent operations are finished

        Default value: DEFAULT_SPLASH_MAX_LOAD_INTERSTITIAL_WAIT_TIME_MS
